search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG136 blood pressure device validated maintained recalibrated cuff technique home monitoring
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic validation of a device or reading
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Commercial material was not accepted as primary clinical evidence.
A clinician must inspect the device, cuff, technique, and readings before documenting adequacy.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults whose clinic or home blood-pressure device and measurement technique are reviewed.
setting_applicability: Primary or outpatient technique review; paediatric, pregnancy, inpatient, and critical-care measurement require separate standards.
UAE_applicability: International NICE evidence requires UAE device, calibration, procurement, training, and facility-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG136 page last updated 2026-02-26 was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG136 is the current NICE hypertension guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The NICE section supports documenting device validation and maintenance, pulse review, standardized environment, posture, arm support, cuff size, and clinician-observed technique without declaring technique correct automatically.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports validated and maintained devices, standardized measurement conditions, appropriate cuff size, pulse review, and clinician-recorded postural measurements.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Home-monitoring training and review recommendations were reviewed, but no advice is generated and no additional broad legacy item was mapped.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

unresolved_source_gaps: Device model, validation listing, maintenance and calibration date, cuff size, posture, environment, rest period, arm, pulse, measurement sequence, reading log, observed errors, retraining, plan, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
